item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 22s This from someone who strategically deleted a reply to @SportsPaulH not 48hrs ago tell
item.description:
Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 22s This from someone who strategically deleted a reply to @SportsPaulH not 48hrs ago telling him to worry more about getting $20 more per article he writes.
Shameless Cita Matt Vincenzi @MattVincenziPGA · 1h Appreciate everyone who wished and celebrated that my 4 and 6 year old would be without a source of income. Love you guys.

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min Now from Bret Baier: Says Saudi Arabia’s funding of LIV “will definitely come to a
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min Now from Bret Baier: Says Saudi Arabia’s funding of LIV “will definitely come to an end at the end of this LIV season, citing a change of priorities.” De Special Report 3 8 319

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 4min Hole locations for the first round of the RBC Heritage 2 6 1 mil
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 4min Hole locations for the first round of the RBC Heritage 2 6 1 mil

item.title: JeffDarlington: Justin Ray reposteó Jeff Darlington @JeffDarlington · 1h LIV CEO Scott O’Neil recently sent an e-mail to the LIV Golf st
item.description:
Justin Ray reposteó Jeff Darlington @JeffDarlington · 1h LIV CEO Scott O’Neil recently sent an e-mail to the LIV Golf staff in the wake of rumors about the league’s future. This excerpt comes from a source within LIV’s league operations:
“I want to be crystal clear: Our season continues exactly as planned, uninterrupted and at full Mostrar más 47 62 212 105 mil
